title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO BUGSAYON. MUNICIPALITY OF MASBATE, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, TO BARRIO B. TITONG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2670 / 51 OG No. 6, 2820 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1259, June 10, 1955 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO BUGSAYON. MUNICIPALITY OF MASBATE, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, TO BARRIO B. TITONG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In recognition of the eminent and patriotic services of the late Benigno Titong, the name of Barrio Bugsayon, Municipality of Masbate, Province of Masbate, is changed to barrio B. Titong.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 10, 1955.
